hero.headline: The World Cup is a game.
hero.subheadline: Predict today's match. Compete with thousands of fans. Build your football legacy.

predict.title: Who wins?
predict.locked: You locked {{team}}. Now tell the world.

culture.title: Every prediction builds your legacy.
culture.body: Every pick, cast, and matchday moment adds to your Culture Score — how the community knows you showed up.
culture.rewards: Your score shapes your BCC rewards. Tokenomics are for builders who want to go deeper.

origin.title: How Pepe became STACK XI
origin.subtitle: Four chapters. One culture arc. Every card is one tap away from Farcaster.

builders.title: Semifinal + Final on Stacks
builders.subtitle: Base believers get first access when the tournament hits the Bitcoin finals arc.

crowdPressure.title: Crowd pressure
quotes: Crowd is loud. Pepe is calm. That's the edge. 🐸
They chase hype. You chase the whistle. Different sport.
Luck doesn't ask permission — and neither should your conviction.
The masses panic at 89'. Builders lock in before kickoff.
Pepe doesn't chase. Luck does. Tag in.
Consensus is comfortable. Correct picks rarely are.
Your pick. Your stake. Your story on Base.
Wrong crowd, right read — that's the whole game.
Fortune favors the frog who ships before the whistle.
Everyone has an opinion. Few have a receipt.
The feed screams. The pitch decides. Stay seated.

ticker.tagline: Base BCC · Building Culture layer on Base

predict.windowClosed: Live match window closed. Predictions lock at kickoff — receipts are in.

squad.perksEmpty: Mint and open a squad pack to unlock prediction boosts, merch codes, and culture multipliers.

mint.title: Blind squad packs
mint.subtitle: 847 sealed packs · 77 editions per player · global bonding curve
mint.genesisNote: Original 11 one-of-ones — legend perks forever (+25% prediction boost).

claim.title: Your predictions
claim.subtitle: Onchain match picks
claim.howItWorks: Your BCC stake sits in the onchain prediction pool. After the final whistle, winners claim here — treasury sends rewards to this wallet. No gas to receive.
claim.autoNote: Payouts are not automatic on-chain yet (v2 claim contract coming). Tap Claim so treasury can route your pool share to this address.
claim.claimEta: Usually within 24 hours after you claim.
claim.claimSubmitted: Claim logged — treasury payout usually within 24 hours after you claim.
claim.noPredictions: No predictions yet for this wallet.
claim.squadBoostHint: Squad boost {{boost}} applied when you claim.
claim.squadBoostApplied: Squad boost {{boost}} locked in for treasury payout.

hero.wonClaim: Won a pick? Claim BCC on profile after the whistle.
hero.claimableBanner: {{count}} winning pick ready — claim on profile.
hero.claimableBanner_other: {{count}} winning picks ready — claim on profile.

quest.title: 7.7M BCC raffle
quest.subtitle: Follow, engage, mint a free ticket. One winner takes {{prize}} BCC — transparent on-chain draw.

connect.title: Connect wallet + social
connect.description: Link Base wallet, X, and Farcaster to verify quests.

followX.title: Follow @buildingcultu3

engageX.title: Engage on X
engageX.description: Like, repost, or comment on the campaign post.

engageFc.title: Engage on Farcaster
engageFc.description: Like, recast, or reply on Leonardo's campaign cast.

mint.title: Mint raffle ticket
mint.description: Free ERC721 ticket — you pay Base gas only. One per wallet.

raffle.title: Public raffle proof
raffle.howItWorks: Commit–reveal draw on Base. Every ticket is an on-chain ERC721. Winner index = hash(secret, close block) mod total tickets.
